name: PayPal Harness Pipeline
description: Customer-scoped working project for PayPal Harness pipeline design and validation; production execution remains human-gated.

entangledTasks.title: Validate the first PayPal-owned Harness action run
entangledTasks.description: Confirm runner type and Node 24 support, source repository and PR context, first service/spec, Harness secret identifiers, and the customer owners. Run validate before contract-test. Human gate: Jason DeLeau or Varun Gnanaselvan confirms technical ownership and a PayPal pipeline owner approves the test execution.
